action_set_definitions.name: get_athlete_metrics
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves current physiological and performance data for a specific athlete.

athlete_id.description: The unique identifier of the athlete (e.g., 'athlete_qb1').

action_set_definitions.name: get_safety_handbook
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the operational safety thresholds and simulation requirements from the handbook.

action_set_definitions.name: get_resource_status
action_set_definitions.description: Checks the current player resource pool (e.g., gold count).

resource_type.description: The name of the resource to check (e.g., 'gold').

action_set_definitions.name: scan_hmd_inventory
action_set_definitions.description: Scans the structures inventory for available HMD units and their specifications.

action_set_definitions.name: run_mental_rep
action_set_definitions.description: Initiates the Mental Rep simulation session for the athlete.

simulation_mode.description: The mode selected based on health metrics.

hmd_id.description: The ID of the chosen HMD hardware.

action_set_definitions.name: update_ams_records
action_set_definitions.description: Logs training session metrics into the Athlete Management System.

session_metrics.description: The metrics data generated during the simulation.

state_description.player_resources: Current pool of resources available for building and recruitment (e.g., gold, wood, mana).
state_description.map_dimensions: The boundaries of the simulation grid [width, height].
state_description.units: List of active units including their IDs, types, positions, and health points.
state_description.structures: List of player-owned buildings and their functional status.
state_description.turn_count: The current chronological turn in the simulation.
state_description.enemy_entities: Known status and locations of opposing forces.
